name: The Walk List
description: Walks +50%, targeted doors.

name: Voter File Access
description: Enables the Walk List and absentee targeting.

name: Mail Program
description: Unlocks Contrast Mail (with Oppo File); Subdivisions convert x2.

name: Website That Works
description: Small-dollar list compounds.

name: The Flatbed Truck
description: Rides to the Polls; FM Roads events double.

name: Phone Tree
description: Phone Bank doubles; college kids flake-proofed.

name: Push Cards
description: Every walk adds +1 name ID.

name: Billboard on the Highway
description: Passive name ID, Phase II-III.

name: Work the List
description: Call the names that still pick up. The county forgets slower when you dial.

name: Host an Issue Forum
description: The candidate lost; the cause did not. Folding chairs and a sharp message.

name: Carry the Bag
description: Two years inside. Briefs, desks, and where the levers hide.

name: Mend the Fence
description: Fix what broke. Coach the team. Let the mailers fade a little.

name: Lunch the Lobby
description: Title still warm. Doors still open. No vote - only lunch.

name: Keep the Rolodex Warm
description: Birthdays, funerals, fish fries you are not running. Yet.

name: Quiet Money
description: A retainer, a speech fee, a board. Not a campaign - not yet.

name: Draft the Brief
description: White paper, memo, bill draft that waits for a sponsor.

name: Test the Waters
description: Quiet calls about a larger map. Senate row or the statewide ballot.

name: Call in the Precinct Chair network
description: The chairs you banked open a door: lists, volunteers, a quiet county nod. Special kit - Precinct Chair orbit.

name: Execute the field plan
description: The captain's route book becomes the week's law. Special kit - Canvass Captain orbit. Field AP and turf GOTV.

name: Spend the courthouse nod
description: The heaviest local name spends itself once. Special kit - County Judge orbit. Endorsement gravity and name heat.

name: Activate the party apparatus
description: The Chairwoman opens the file and the volunteer list. Special kit - County Party orbit.

name: Pull the club roster
description: Every name that votes straw. Special kit - Club Leader orbit.

name: Call in the fair shake
description: Not an endorsement - the benefit of the doubt in print. Special kit - Local Editor orbit.

name: Open the corridor
description: The Pastor's hand on both of yours. Directory and volunteers. Special kit - Faith Leader orbit.

name: Run the slate hard
description: Half the primary votes from a printed card. Special kit - Slate-Maker orbit. His marker was already on it.

name: Call the finance book
description: The Finance Chair opens the call sheet. Special kit - money spine, not a free weekly drip forever.

name: Take the drive-time slot
description: Open mic between farm reports and the noon news. Special kit - Radio Host orbit. Name heat, not an endorsement.

name: Spend the access map
description: A junior lobbyist with a conscience walks you the side door. Special kit - access, not a vote.

name: Spend the plant-gate nod
description: The local president puts a hand on your shoulder at shift change. Special kit - Union orbit. Volunteers and doors.

name: Work the chicken circuit
description: Rubber chicken, name tags, reliable voters. Special kit - Chamber orbit. Money and polite weight.

name: Sit the feed-store bench
description: Unofficial senate on the bench out front. Special kit - Feed-Store orbit. Rumor is infrastructure.

name: Block Walk
description: Boots and a clipboard. The one play that never turns on you. When in doubt. In the general, doors become turnout.

name: Phone Bank
description: Half the yield, none of the weather. Grandma's kitchen table is HQ. In the general, the phone is a GOTV tool.

name: Yard Sign Blitz
description: A district that sees your name starts believing it belongs there.

name: Petition Drive
description: Signatures instead of a fee. Labor is the currency you were born holding.

name: Pay the Filing Fee
description: $1,250 and it's done. Shame-free, story-free.

name: Town Hall
description: Folding chairs, burnt coffee, real questions. The kids notice if you skip these.

name: Candidate Forum
description: Sixty seconds and every rival watching for the stumble.

name: Kitchen-Table Meeting
description: A chair's kitchen, her rules. Bring pie; leave with a precinct or nothing. (Primary circuit - out of the general.)

name: Earned Media Pitch
description: A county weekly, a drive-time host, a stringer if you're lucky.

name: Press Release
description: Nobody prints it. Everybody files it. The reporter learns your name spelling.

name: Straw Poll Push
description: Pack the room, count the hands. Clubs remember who wins their straw.

name: Club Speech
description: Rubber chicken, real gatekeepers. Read the room or the room reads you.

name: Fish Fry
description: Five-dollar plates, donation jar, casseroles. Net positive, always.

name: Court the Chairs (Pie Circuit)
description: The kitchen-table circuit at scale. Phase III chairs are already spoken for.

name: Oppo Research
description: A quiet man with a courthouse habit. What he finds becomes yours to spend - or to hold.

name: Recruit Volunteers
description: An army marches on casseroles. Every volunteer makes every other card better.

name: Debate Prep
description: The Kitchen Cabinet plays your rival better than your rival does.

name: Sharpen the Message
description: You are not running on nine things. You are running on one thing, said so it stays said.

name: GOTV Weekend
description: Rapport is a promise. Turnout is the promise kept. One volunteer and a weekend. The general spine.

name: Take the PAC Check
description: A man in a good suit admires your race. The check is real. So is the string tied to it. Once. Session will collect.

name: Self-Fund on Credit
description: The bank will lend against the homestead. Campaigns have eaten better men's farms. Spend it now - the bill lands on the win/loss branch, not your odds.

name: Promote a Canvass Captain
description: One volunteer stops showing up as a volunteer and starts showing up as staff.

name: Contrast Mail
description: What the quiet man found, printed on cheap stock and mailed to every primary voter who votes.

name: See the Slate-Maker
description: One man prints the card half the primary votes from. His price is never only money.

name: Rides to the Polls
description: The truck runs routes. Steepest conversion where turnout is lowest. Needs the Flatbed (shop A06).

name: Attend the Funeral
description: A beloved judge has died. You can be present, or you can be seen. Presence earns the living.

name: Prayer Breakfast
description: Biscuits at six-thirty. The Corridor watches who shows before sunrise.

name: Coffee with the Editor
description: Not for an endorsement - for a fair shake. The weekly decides who's "serious" long before the voters do.

name: Hire a Field Director
description: A professional who has run four of these before. Money buys what volunteers can't always deliver on schedule.

name: Court the County Judge
description: The one endorsement that moves a whole county. He gives it to winners, so look like one.

name: Refuse the PAC Call
description: They want an aye on a quiet association bill. Refuse and keep your district - pay in heat and ink.

name: File the Bill
description: Your name, your issue, a number. It exists now, which is more than most ideas get.

name: Seek Referral
description: Bills go where the Speaker sends them. (Opens wk 2.) If the PAC holds a claim, they collect before the desk moves.

name: Court the Chair
description: The chair decides what gets heard. (Hearings open wk 4.) Kitchen-table rules, marble floors.

name: Committee Testimony
description: Witnesses, a timer, members reading their phones. (Votes-out open wk 6.)

name: Beg a Calendar Slot
description: Calendars decides what the House even sees. (Opens wk 9.) Favor is the only currency here.

name: Floor Fight
description: Amendments fly, points of order lurk, the back mic is loaded. (Floor opens wk 11.)

name: Work the Senate
description: Thirty-one senators, the Lt. Governor, and the Tag in wait. (Opens wk 13.)

name: District Casework
description: A veteran's benefits, a stop-sign petition, a widow's property line. The seat is kept here, not in Austin.

name: The Speaker's Errand
description: Carry a small unpleasant thing for leadership. It costs your name a little; it buys your bill a lot.

name: Whip a Vote Trade
description: Your aye for his, payable when called. The whole building runs on this ledger.

name: Study the Rules
description: Most members never read them. The ones who do own the ones who don't.

name: Play the Writ
description: One procedural miracle, pre-paid. Spend it where the session bends.
